subject: FW: Invitation to a Power Breakfast at the DTA
body:
From: Ellen Snibbe Baker [mailto:ellensnibbebaker@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, January 29, 2008 10:51 PM
To: Ellen Snibbe Baker
Subject: Invitation to a Power Breakfast at the DTA

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 



 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Feel free to come as my guest to the power breakfast at the Down Town
Association which is 60 Pine Street- Wall Street stop on the Lexington
line.  Breakfast starts at 7:30 AM and then the talk will begin at 8 and
over in time for the start of work.  Tom Caldwell is the founder and
Chairman of Caldwell Securities and his asset management/hedge fund
company are the second largest owner of seats on the NY Stock exchange.
His performance has been so extraordinary that you will delight in his
talk.  Hope to see you there on February 12th.  ATB  

 

 

 

 

 

 
<mailto:reception@thedta.com?subject=2/12%20Reservation%20Request%20(Bre
akfast%20Speaker%20Series)>  

 

 

Ellen Snibbe Baker

55 East 87th St., 5M

New York, New York  10128

 

ellensnibbebaker@yahoo.com

 

646-682-9719

917-304-1652 cell

 

"The Future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams."
Eleanor Roosevelt

Feel free to come as my guest to the power breakfast at the Down Town Association which is 60 Pine Street- Wall Street stop on the Lexington line.  Breakfast starts at 7:30 AM and then the talk will begin at 8 and over in time for the start of work.  Tom Caldwell is the founder and Chairman of Caldwell Securities and his asset management/hedge fund company are the second largest owner of seats on the NY Stock exchange.  His performance has been so extraordinary that you will delight in his talk.  Hope to see you there on February 12th.  ATB
